message:
test(build-info): Add Agent Mail capability detection tests

Add comprehensive test coverage for the Agent Mail capability detection
logic to ensure the fix from the previous commit works correctly.

Changes:

apps/gateway/src/services/build-info.ts:
- Make getCapabilities() call computeCapabilities() each time instead
  of returning a cached value, ensuring env var changes are reflected
  (important for testing and runtime config changes)

apps/gateway/src/__tests__/build-info.capabilities.test.ts (new):
- Test agentMail=false when no Agent Mail env vars are set
- Test agentMail=true when AGENT_MAIL_MCP_ENABLED=true
- Test agentMail=true when AGENT_MAIL_MCP_COMMAND is set
- Test agentMail=true when legacy AGENTMAIL_URL is set
- Proper env var save/restore between tests

Closes: bd-zvs88

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
